title: Kazene Contribution Graph Seed
description: A lightweight contribution graph structure that connects trace receipts into influence, lineage, memory, review, and future royalty-preparation relationships.

graph_id.description: Unique identifier for this contribution graph.

version.description: Protocol version used by this contribution graph.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the contribution graph was created.

graph_type.description: Type of contribution graph being represented.

root_trace_id.description: Trace receipt ID representing the root or origin of this graph.

terminal_trace_ids.description: Trace receipt IDs representing terminal or downstream endpoints of this graph.

nodes.description: Trace receipt nodes included in this contribution graph.

trace_id.description: Trace receipt ID represented by this graph node.

node_type.description: Role of this trace receipt within the contribution graph.

contribution_hint.description: Lightweight hint describing the contribution represented by this node.

memory_action.description: Optional memory metabolism action associated with this node.

edges.description: Directed relationships between trace receipt nodes.

from_trace_id.description: Source trace receipt ID for this directed relationship.

to_trace_id.description: Target trace receipt ID for this directed relationship.

relation_type.description: Relationship type between two trace receipts.

influence_weight.description: Provisional influence weight for this relationship. This is not a final attribution or royalty score.

review_required.description: Whether this relationship requires human review.

review_reason.description: Optional reason why this edge requires review.

graph_review_required.description: Whether the contribution graph as a whole requires human review.

value_hook.description: Optional future value-routing hook. This does not calculate payment.

attribution_required.description: Whether attribution may be required for this contribution graph.
